description: Style NoteSober coloured base with shiny stones makes these sandals classy yet elegant. They can be worn with Ethnic Indian wear as well as with a pair of jeans and a nice kurta with some ethnic accessories.Product DetailsBlunt toed sandals with a thong style strap with crystal and gem embellishmentsBrown footbed with bronze detailingTPR outsoleMaterial and CareSyntheticDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
